zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Erskine of that Ilk於1274年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，他的父親Sir John Erskine Of Mar25歲，母親Margaret Macgilronan26歲。他和Alice Stewart至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1331年在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Erskine of that Ilk was born in 1274, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Erskine Of Mar, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Macgilronan, was 26. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Alice Stewart. He died in 1331, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Erskine of that Ilk est né en 1274, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Erskine Of Mar, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Macgilronan, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Alice Stewart. Il est décédé en 1331, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Erskine of that Ilk(이)가 1274년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Erskine Of Mar(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Macgilronan(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Alice Stewart(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1331년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.
